subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of holiness sent down in truth, wherein every wise decree is inscribed and wherein is that which draweth nigh those who have believed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات القدس نزلت بالحق و فیه یذکر کل امر حکیم و فیه ما یقرب الذینهم آمنوا
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
